themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And the fear of you and the dread of you shall be upon every beast of the earth, and upon eve...". Word-study detail reinforces "וּמוֹרַֽאֲכֶ֤ם: And the fear of you - fear; by implication, a fearful thing or deed".
